sql.query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_workflows w WHERE w.tenantId=:t1 AND w.status NOT IN ('complete','cancelled','archived')) AS activeWorkflows,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_tasks t WHERE t.tenantId=:t2 AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled')) AS openTasks,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_tasks t WHERE t.tenantId=:t3 AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS overdueTasks,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_tasks t WHERE t.tenantId=:t4 AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.dueDate BETWEEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,INTERVAL 7 DAY)) AS dueSoonTasks,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_tasks t WHERE t.tenantId=:t5 AND t.assignedToUserId=:userId AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled')) AS myOpenTasks,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_tasks t WHERE t.tenantId=:t6 AND t.assignedToUserId IS NULL AND t.assignedToTeamId IS NULL AND t.assignedToRoleId IS NULL AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled')) AS unassignedTasks,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_tasks t WHERE t.tenantId=:t7 AND t.completedDate>=DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,INTERVAL 30 DAY)) AS completedLast30Days,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_notifications n WHERE n.tenantId=:t8 AND n.userId=:userId2 AND n.status='unread') AS unreadNotifications

SELECT u.id AS userId,u.displayName,CAST(COUNT(t.id) AS UNSIGNED) AS openTaskCount,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 END) AS UNSIGNED) AS overdueCount,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.status='in_progress' THEN 1 END) AS UNSIGNED) AS inProgressCount FROM tbl_user_tenant_roles utr INNER JOIN tbl_users u ON u.id=utr.userId LEFT JOIN tbl_tasks t ON t.assignedToUserId=u.id AND t.tenantId=utr.tenantId AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') WHERE utr.tenantId=:tenantId AND utr.isActive=1 GROUP BY u.id,u.displayName HAVING openTaskCount>0 ORDER BY openTaskCount DESC,u.displayName LIMIT 10

SELECT tm.id AS teamId,tm.teamName,CAST(COUNT(t.id) AS UNSIGNED) AS openTaskCount,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 END) AS UNSIGNED) AS overdueCount FROM tbl_teams tm LEFT JOIN tbl_tasks t ON t.assignedToTeamId=tm.id AND t.tenantId=tm.tenantId AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') WHERE tm.tenantId=:tenantId AND tm.isActive=1 GROUP BY tm.id,tm.teamName HAVING openTaskCount>0 ORDER BY openTaskCount DESC,tm.teamName LIMIT 10

SELECT status,CAST(COUNT(*) AS UNSIGNED) AS workflowCount FROM tbl_workflows WHERE tenantId=:tenantId GROUP BY status ORDER BY FIELD(status,'overdue','in_progress','waiting','not_started','active','draft','complete','cancelled','archived')

SELECT priority,CAST(COUNT(*) AS UNSIGNED) AS taskCount FROM tbl_tasks WHERE tenantId=:tenantId AND status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') GROUP BY priority ORDER BY FIELD(priority,'urgent','high','normal','low')

SELECT t.id,t.taskName,t.status,t.priority,t.dueDate,w.id AS workflowId,w.workflowName,ws.stageName,COALESCE(u.displayName,tm.teamName,'Unassigned') AS assigneeName,CASE WHEN t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isOverdue FROM tbl_tasks t INNER JOIN tbl_workflows w ON w.id=t.workflowId AND w.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_workflow_stages ws ON ws.id=t.workflowStageId AND ws.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_users u ON u.id=t.assignedToUserId LEFT JOIN tbl_teams tm ON tm.id=t.assignedToTeamId AND tm.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE t.tenantId=:tenantId AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.dueDate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.dueDate ASC LIMIT 12

SELECT w.id,w.workflowName,w.referenceCode,w.status,w.targetDate,w.modifiedDate,wt.templateName,CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS UNSIGNED) AS taskCount,CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.status='complete' THEN t.id END) AS UNSIGNED) AS completedTaskCount FROM tbl_workflows w LEFT JOIN tbl_workflow_templates wt ON wt.id=w.templateId LEFT JOIN tbl_tasks t ON t.workflowId=w.id AND t.tenantId=w.tenantId WHERE w.tenantId=:tenantId GROUP BY w.id ORDER BY w.modifiedDate DESC LIMIT 6
